clusters.highest_leverage_untested: post_stair_occupancy_grid_rebuild: force full occupancy grid reset from agent's post-stair position rather than reusing pre-climb grid — the pre-climb grid may incorrectly mark upper-floor cells as obstacles, artificially capping frontier count at 13
